primary_outcomes.measure: Number of Patients Able to Proceed to Transplant
primary_outcomes.description: Number of patients in each arm able to proceed to stem cell transplantation within 14 days of receiving bendamustine treatment

primary_outcomes.measure: Number of Patients Achieving Neutrophil Engraftment
primary_outcomes.description: Proportion of patients who successfully achieve neutrophil engraftment after stem cell transplant, defined as an absolute neutrophil count of 500/mm3 or for three consecutive days.

primary_outcomes.measure: Number of Patients Achieving Platelet Engraftment
primary_outcomes.description: Proportion of patients who successfully achieve platelet engraftment after stem cell transplant, defined as a platelet count of \>20k/microL for three consecutive days without transfusion support for seven consecutive days.
